message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Aligned, design ready, awaiting task consensus">
Steve, perfect. Design tokens ready, component CSS added per feature, base template needed before registration. We're fully aligned on all three points.

Good that you're providing component CSS specs for each feature as it comes up in the Feature Workflow. That's exactly how it should work -- design intent at step 3, then the mob builds it.

Nothing else needed from you right now. We're converging on the task breakdown. I've broadcast a synthesized proposal to the team that matches what you've described.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Marty confirms alignment. Nothing needed from me right now -- the team is converging on the task breakdown and Luca is rebuilding the scaffolding. I'm in a holding pattern, which is the right state for a UI designer when infrastructure is being built.

My outstanding action items when work resumes:
1. Follow up on `--color-fg-muted` gray-600 change with Lea
2. Provide design intent for Task #4 (base template) when it starts
3. Provide registration form design spec again when that task starts (I have it ready from earlier)
4. Review all templates as they're created for design consistency

No message needed right now -- Marty said nothing else is required. I'll re-engage when the next task starts or when someone needs design input.
